title: boat physic
description: configurable boat slipperiness for better ice racing
body:
this mod allows you to manage boat skidding on packed ice/blue ice

### # How to use : 
```
/slip 0.0 -> vanilla behavior
/slip 0.05 -> slightly reduced drift
/slip 0.5-0.6 -> strongly reduced drift (basically the boat act like a very fast horse)
```
### # Do i need to install on client or server ?
 the mod is client side for singleplayer and only needed serverside for multiplayer
